channel.title: TIL on Space Looming
channel.description: Recent content in TIL on Space Looming

item.title: TIL
item.description:
TIL = Today I learned

2024-11-06 给 Emacs 打 Patch

From Telegram 群组 “Emacs_CN Lite 轻聊版” @Lucius_Chen

  1. /opt/homebrew/Library/Taps/d12frosted/homebrew-emacs-plus/Formula/ 下的 emacs-plus@31.rb 需要 Path 栏下的 local_path 和 commit
item.content:
TIL = Today I learned

2024-11-06 给 Emacs 打 Patch

From Telegram 群组 “Emacs_CN Lite 轻聊版” @Lucius_Chen

  1. /opt/homebrew/Library/Taps/d12frosted/homebrew-emacs-plus/Formula/ 下的 emacs-plus@31.rb 需要 Path 栏下的 local_path 和 commit
